title: Chirala Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Chirala with a Z-Score of +4.57. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Chirala is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 15.0 GG. 
 The humidity is at 67% and the wind speed is 6.6 km/h, making the conditions even more unbearable. 
 The Heating Degree Day (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating no relief from the heat.
